name: Italian Marinated Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Olive oil (vegetable oil may be substituted)
2 Green onions with tops, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the mushroom slices and lemon juice.
2. Stir in the olive oil, green onions, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Just before serving, transfer the marinated mushrooms to a serving bowl using a slotted spoon.
5. Sprinkle with paprika and garnish with fresh parsley sprigs, if desired.
6. Serve with bread sticks on the side.
